text: Papa ne aaj hostel aakar keh diya ki main college chhodkar gaon waapas chalu family dukan chalane ke liye. Jab maine thoda bola toh mummy ne rona shuru kar diya aur boli ki meri wajah se unki tabiyat kharab ho rahi hai. Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai, bas rona aa raha hai aur samajh nahi aa raha ki life me aage kya hoga.

Bina mujhse pooche papa ne ek local sarkari naukri ka form bhar diya hai aur padhai chhodne ko keh rahe hain. Mummy baar-baar bol rahi hain ki parivaar ki izzat mere haath mein hai aur agar maine mana kiya toh wo kabhi khush nahi rahengi. Mujhe itna gussa aur dukh mehsus ho raha hai ki main kuch soch hi nahi pa raha hoon, bas kamre mein band hokar baitha hoon.

Papa ne announce kar diya ki meri placement ke baad meri shadi us rishtey mein hogi jo unhone tay kiya hai. Mummy ne mujhse kaha ki unhone mere liye itne vrat rakhe hain aur agar main unki baat nahi maanunga toh unhe sadma lag jayega. Main itna ghabraya hua hoon aur rona aa raha hai ki mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki main unse baat kaise karun.

Papa ne decide kiya ki main ab hostel se nikal kar bua ke ghar rahungi taaki kharcha kam ho sake. Mummy ne taana maara ki mere nakhre poore karne ke chakkar mein wo pehle hi karze mein hain. Mera dimaag itna bhara hua hai aur main itni helplessness mehsus kar raha hoon ki main syllabus ki ek line bhi nahi padh pa raha.

Bina meri marzi ke papa ne mera UPSC coaching se naam katwa kar gaon bula liya hai. Mummy ne rona-dhona shuru kar diya ki meri zidd ki wajah se ghar mein kalesh ho raha hai aur unka sar samaj mein neecha ho raha hai. Main poori tarah se toot gaya hoon, bas rona hi nikal raha hai aur future bilkul andhera lag raha hai.
